To My Favourite Kuchupuchu
The owl lands at dusk.
Sealed in burgundy wax —
From the one who deeply loves you.
Tap to open
On the occasion of your twenty-fourth year

A Most Extraordinary Birthday

— ✦ —
The owl lands, with it an envelope, Sealed in wax — the Hogwarts crest, destined for you

"Live life to the fullest, for regrets always spoil what fun future God has planned for you"

— Albus Sriram, who never tasted good food in Mumbai before you
But you — a master of Two. The dream and the living.
The raga and the revelry. The spell and the meal.
Act I · The Sorting of a 24-Year-Old

The Hat Deliberates

— ✦ —
"Hmm," says the battered old hat, settling on your head.
"Twenty-four. The age od true love, broom rides and concerts with a pinch of squabbles."
"I see a mind that hears music in every room it enters. One that sings her heart out and one that craves for Meat, Music and Mushroom A heart that is ever so gentle yet resilient, fierce yet calming. My beautiful cute baby"

"You could be great, you know. It's all here in your head — and, judging by the dinner you ordered today, in your stomach too."

— The Sorting Hat, being its usual self
— ✦ —
The verdict: rare. Someone this particular about music, food, and art belongs in their own house entirely.
Act II · The Raga of Years

Harshini at Twenty-Four

— ✦ —
Every raga has a time of day, a season, a mood.
Harshini belongs to the evening — elegant, unhurried, golden.
That's you at twenty-five.
The swaras of Harshini — all sharp, all brilliant. No flat notes allowed.
· · ·
The alaap opens slowly — like your mornings.
The pallavi builds — like your ambitions.
The kalpanaswaram spirals, defies gravity, comes home.
Like every conversation with you.
Act IV · The Pensieve of Memories

Silver Threads

— ✦ —
Dumbledore kept his memories in a stone basin filled with silver light.
This is ours — add the ones worth keeping.
🔮
Epilogue · Mischief Managed
Happy Birthday
— ✦ —
To someone who makes me smile,
To the one who keeps bringing my inner child out,
To the one who is the kindest, works the hardest and wishes the best for others,
To the one caring about others even when you have 100s of problems,
To the one who everyone is proud of and the one who makes me happy and horny hehe
HAPPY BIRTHDAYYYY HARSHINIIIII!!!!
I LOVE YOUUUUU SOOO MUCHHHHH
